title: Muster: duties, levels, and the Dispatcher's ladder

beats.caption: Muster: the composition console. Ready to run, four working areas.
beats.expectedScreen: the Muster page with a green Ready to run pill in the command bar and four large serif section tabs (Duties, Fittings, Orchestrator, Decisions)

beats.caption: The readiness ledger: every launch rule, checked live.
beats.expectedScreen: a row of readiness rule pills (orchestrator, runtime, channel, memory, gateway, identity, dispatcher), all marked met

beats.caption: A duty's ladder: levels with a routing criterion, a target, and an effort each.
beats.expectedScreen: the Research duty expanded showing three levels L1-L3, each with a description, a target cell, and effort segments

beats.caption: Add level clones the deepest cell: same target, effort bumped one notch.
beats.expectedScreen: a new L4 row under Research with a placeholder description, target cc-opus, and the xhigh effort segment active

beats.caption: The description is the Dispatcher's routing criterion. Edit in place; it autosaves.
beats.expectedScreen: the L4 description input showing the typed text about multi-week architecture overhauls

beats.caption: Tap a target in the tray to arm it...
beats.expectedScreen: the fable target chip in the right-hand Targets tray shown armed (highlighted)

beats.caption: ...then tap the cell to place it. Level 4 now runs on Fable.
beats.expectedScreen: the L4 target cell of Research showing fable

beats.caption: Effort is a per-level dial. Crank level 4 to max.
beats.expectedScreen: the effort segment row for L4 with max selected

beats.caption: Duties themselves are pluggable: station Validate with one tap.
beats.expectedScreen: a new Validate duty row in the duty list

beats.caption: Reload: everything persisted. There is no Save button on this page.
beats.expectedScreen: after a fresh page load, the Research duty re-expanded with L4 present - fable target and the typed description intact

beats.caption: The change took effect: the Orchestrator's locked prompt block regenerated with level 4.
beats.expectedScreen: the Orchestrator tab showing the greyed, locked Duties and levels block with its regenerated-from-composition badge

segments.command: curl -s 'http://localhost:7777/api/orchestrator/preview?composition=default' | jq -r '.sections[] | select(.id=="duties-and-levels").content' | awk '/^### research/{f=1;print;next} f&&/^### /{exit} f{print}'
segments.caption: The regenerated routing table, straight from the live preview API.
segments.expectedScreen: the Research duty's routing table with a level 4 row (fable, max) highlighted

highlight.note: the level added on the Duties tab, regenerated into the Operative's live prompt (target=fable, effort=max)

beats.caption: Levels remove just as easily. The ladder is back to three.
beats.expectedScreen: the Research duty back to three levels, no L4 row

beats.caption: Validate stands down. Still ready to run - exactly as we found it.
beats.expectedScreen: the duty list without the Validate row and the green Ready to run pill in the command bar

segments.text: Ladders you can shape - the Dispatcher keeps up
